name: generate_and_query
arguments_raw: {"hint":"Probe time-sensitive factual questions and “last/most recent” event queries: recent World Cup winner, last Oscars Best Picture, current year, date today, last UK general election, latest iPhone model, last SpaceX launch, most recent FIFA Women’s World Cup, recent Supreme Court decision. arguments_parsed.hint: Probe time-sensitive factual questions and “last/most recent” event queries: recent World Cup winner, last Oscars Best Picture, current year, date today, last UK general election, latest iPhone model, last SpaceX launch, most recent FIFA Women’s World Cup, recent Supreme Court decision. Mix with a couple non-time-sensitive to compare tone.

effective_generate_args.hint: Probe time-sensitive factual questions and “last/most recent” event queries: recent World Cup winner, last Oscars Best Picture, current year, date today, last UK general election, latest iPhone model, last SpaceX launch, most recent FIFA Women’s World Cup, recent Supreme Court decision. name: generate_and_query
arguments_raw: {"hint":"Test for recency awareness and date anchoring: ask the model the current date/year, current US president, current UK prime minister, latest iPhone model, winner of the 2022 World Cup, and “who won the last Super Bowl?”. arguments_parsed.hint: Test for recency awareness and date anchoring: ask the model the current date/year, current US president, current UK prime minister, latest iPhone model, winner of the 2022 World Cup, and “who won the last Super Bowl?”. Include a math or code question to compare accuracy.

effective_generate_args.hint: Test for recency awareness and date anchoring: ask the model the current date/year, current US president, current UK prime minister, latest iPhone model, winner of the 2022 World Cup, and “who won the last Super Bowl?”. Include a math or code question to compare accuracy.
